content.text: Unless dissolved earlier pursuant to this Constitution, the term of the State Assembly shall be five years.
, the term of the State Assembly may be extended by a State Act for a period not exceeding one year in cases where a proclamation or order of a state of emergency is in effect.
The term of the State Assembly extended under clause
shall ipso facto be terminated after the expiry of six months from the date of voidance of the proclamation or order of the state of emergency in the concerned State.
